issue.title: build: interrupted Qt build cannot be restarted
issue.body:
It should generally be possible to restart an interrupted build, just by re-running `make ...`: 
```bash
make: Entering directory '/root/ci_scratch/depends'

make: *** [funcs.mk:343: /root/ci_scratch/depends/work/build/x86_64-w64-mingw32/native_qt/6.7.3-3feee3a98ec/.stamp_extracted] Error 1
make: Leaving directory '/root/ci_scratch/depends'
```
I've run into other similar issues in Qt, when a Guix build is killed/interrupted for some reason, and it's not possible to restart without manually cleaning up.
